title: fraxinus nigra var. juglandifolia
intro: Fraxinus nigra var. juglandifolia, also known as the black ash or manchineel ash, is a variety of the black ash tree that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent compounds. The health benefits of Fraxinus nigra var. juglandifolia include treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Fraxinus nigra var. juglandifolia can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
